<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are reviewing PR #5 on /Users/grant/code/chroma-curve (branch feat/target-color-input vs main). You have one assigned task in the team task list — read it first via TaskList, then claim it via TaskUpdate (owner: "refactor-reviewer", status: in_progress).

Scope: Component restructure only. The PR flattened app/src/components/{controls,curves}/* into per-component folders with index.ts barrels (e.g., app/src/components/TargetSwatch/{TargetSwatch.tsx,index.ts}). Several components were extracted/split: LightnessChart, SaturationCurve, EffectiveSaturation, ChartTabs, SaturationSlider, ToggleSwitch, InlineSelect, ControlBar. Header.tsx moved to Header/Header.tsx.

What to look for (high-confidence only):
- Broken or stale imports anywhere in the codebase referencing old paths (controls/ or curves/).
- Inconsistent barrel pattern (some folders re-exporting more than the named component, default vs named export inconsistencies).
- Components that should have been split further or were over-split (e.g., LightnessChart/chartConstants.ts is 0 bytes — verify and report).
- Props or contract changes that broke callers.
- Circular deps — run `npx madge --circular app/src` from /Users/grant/code/chroma-curve and report findings.
- Dead exports — check if `npm run knip` from app/ flags anything new.

Use git diff origin/main...HEAD --stat and targeted reads of moved files. Use rg/fd, not grep/find.

Report back via SendMessage to "team-lead" with a concise findings list grouped by severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low / Nit). Each finding: file:line, what's wrong, why it matters, suggested fix. Then mark your task completed via TaskUpdate.
</teammate-message>
